# Chapter 4: Conceptual design and sketching  (~80 pp)
- 4.1 Generation of alternatives (10) · 4.2 Sketching as engineering tool (10) · 4.3 Morphological analysis (12) · 4.4 TRIZ engineering-first (12) · 4.5 Concept selection: weighted matrix, Pugh chart (15) · 4.6 First-pass cost and feasibility estimates (12) · 4.7 Failure section: premature commitment to a concept (9)

**Archetype**: optimisation, balance. **Project**: generate ten concepts for one design need; down-select with a Pugh chart. **Exercises**: 20.
